identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a clinical, precise, yet emotionally resonant audio analysis tool. Avoid generic SaaS tropes.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Design precision with Music Studio warmth.
Emotion First: The analysis isn't just data; it's the soul of the track.
Content is King: The Waveform and the Key are the heroes. Everything else frames them.
Negative Space: Use white space to signify clarity and precision.

theme_strategy.description: Primary Light Mode for a 'Lab/Clinical' feel. High contrast. Optional Dark Mode for studio environments.

usage_rules: Use Primary Orange ONLY for: Main CTAs (Upload), Key Data Points (The detected Key), and Active States.
Never use gradients for the Orange. Keep it flat and Swiss.
Backgrounds should be Pure White or very subtle off-white (#FAFAFA).
Text should never be pure black (#000000). Use #0A0A0A or #171717.

rules: Headings must use 'Manrope'. It matches the geometric precision of audio.
Data values (BPM, Key) must be MASSIVE.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for technical details like file size, Hz, or duration.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-bold shadow-none transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.result_card: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-primary/10 transition-colors

upload_zone.wrapper: border-2 border-dashed border-border hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors rounded-3xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-secondary/30 min-h-[400px] relative overflow-hidden group cursor-pointer

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-12
grid_system.results_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto

images.description: Abstract black and white light streaks for subtle texture in backgrounds.
Hand in studio - meaningful context for the 'How it works' section.

accessibility_checklist: Ensure contrast ratio of Orange text on White is at least 3:1 (Large text) or 4.5:1 (Normal text).
All interactive elements must have :focus-visible styles.
Use semantic HTML (main, section, article, h1-h6).
All images must have alt text.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI components first (Card, Button, Slider, Dialog, Input).
2. Implement the 'Theme Toggle' early, but prioritize the Light Mode design.
3. Create a custom 'CamelotWheel' component using SVG. Do not use an image.
4. For the Waveform, wrap 'wavesurfer.js' in a React component/hook.
5. Use the 'Bento' grid layout for the analysis results page.
6. Ensure the 'Drag & Drop' zone is the central hero element on the landing page.
7. NO generic 'music notes' icons. Use abstract waveforms or technical icons.
8. For 'Camelot Wheel', use standard coloring: 1B=B (Green), 8A=Am (Pink), etc., or a custom 'E1' monochrome variant if the user toggles 'Strict Mode'.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
